color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BLOCKED_FAST — fast call (< ~1ms)
stay in HBM (L1): don't page a spinlock wait

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BLOCKED_SLOW — slow call (net / sandbox / human)
page KV to DRAM (L2)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 66, 79) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SLEEPING — cron steward, idle long
page to SSD (L3) or recompute (L4)
keep token log + shared-prefix ptr

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
one mechanism, two payoffs:
the same static call table drives BOTH
pre-flight verification AND demand paging
